prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel, 62mm inducer, 82mm exducer) for the **2.5L TFSI DAZA/DANA (EA855) engine**, paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** and **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe** with **Vibrant 1799 resonated catalytic converter** to maintain backpressure while reducing lag. Target boost: 2.2 bar (32 psi) with **MethaBoost Stage 2 methanol injection (50/50 water-meth mix)** to suppress detonation and cool intake temps by 20°C.

Full **Motec M150 ECU standalone management** with **AEM CD-7 dash logger** and **Bosch Motorsport 0280158802 1000cc high-impedance injectors**, calibrated for **E85 flex-fuel compatibility** (up to 100% ethanol). Supporting mods: **Audi RS3 8V.2 high-pressure fuel pump (HPFP)** and **Radium Engineering dual-catch can setup** with **AN-6 braided lines** to prevent oil dilution under sustained boost.

Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers (2-way adjustable, 800lb/in front, 700lb/in rear springs)** and **Audi TT RS-specific **034 Motorsport X-Brace** (aluminum, 1.2kg weight reduction) to eliminate subframe flex. Braking upgraded to **AP Racing CP9660 front calipers (6-piston, 400mm discs)** with **Ferodo DS2500 pads** and **Motul RBF 660 brake fluid** for fade resistance under 200°C+ track temps.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (carbon fiber, 30mm extended fenders front/rear)** with **custom 50mm overfenders** to clear **20x9.5 ET35 front and 20x11 ET40 rear wheels** wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R (255/30/20 front, 295/25/20 rear)**. Paint: **Audi Nardo Grey (LZ7W) with matte black vinyl wrap on the roof and pillars**.

**Audi TT RS-specific **Milltek Sport 90mm titanium exhaust system** (cat-back, non-resonated) with **custom X-pipe merge collectors** and **Valvetronic electronic bypass valves** for on-demand backfire tuning. Rear diffuser: **Seibon Carbon Fiber GT-style diffuser** with **integrated tow hooks** and **LED reverse lights**.

**Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro Pole Position seats (carbon shell, FIA-approved 6-point harnesses)** and **Schroth Profi II 3-inch belts**. Roll cage: **Custom 8-point bolt-in cage (T45 steel, powder-coated satin black)** by **Custom Cages UK**, with **Momo Prototipo steering wheel (350mm, suede)** and **AiM MXS Strada dash display** replacing the stock cluster.
